blackwood.label: Blackwood
blackwood.description: Petrified deadfall from a blackwood grove. Unnaturally dense, as though the same tree had fallen time and again to the same place.

structural_alloy.label: Structural Alloy
structural_alloy.description: Recovered alloy from exposed braces, mineral veins, and ruin-metal seams. It holds a dull strength, as if the old structures still remember their shape.

ruin_scrap.label: Ruin Scrap
ruin_scrap.description: Scrap feedstock recovered from collapsed ruins and broken machinery. Some pieces still bear levy marks from the first desperate years after the Severance.

spent_charge_cell.label: Spent Charge Cell
spent_charge_cell.description: A dull power cell with almost no charge remaining. Beneath the grime, its manufacture stamp repeats beside casualty marks no single war could account for.

frayed_signal_filament.label: Frayed Signal Filament
frayed_signal_filament.description: A severed signal thread used in old witness relays. Even broken, it bends toward anything still broadcasting.

cracked_field_tag.label: Cracked Field Tag
cracked_field_tag.description: A cracked field tag split clean through the name. The service number was enough for the ledger. The rest was lost to the Mandate Wars.

power_components.label: Power Components
power_components.description: Salvaged regulators, relays, and sealed cells pulled from powered wreckage. The useful ones still emit a faint hum.

resin_clot.label: Resin Clot
resin_clot.description: Dense fungal resin harvested from ruin-fed growths. It seals cracks, binds scrap, and refuses to rot.

capacitor_dust.label: Capacitor Dust
capacitor_dust.description: Conductive dust recovered from ruptured capacitor banks and shorted panels. It clings to anything still carrying charge.

signal_filament.label: Signal Filament
signal_filament.description: A hair-thin conductor pulled from a ruined comm hood. It still twitches toward active transmitters.

memory_glass_fragment.label: Memory Glass Fragment
memory_glass_fragment.description: Brittle glass from an Archive Engine's mnemonic substrate. It once held local provenance in support of a Lattice. After the field failed, each fracture retained a different history of the same ruin, and none will yield to the others.

white_thread_knot.label: White Thread Knot
white_thread_knot.description: A clean white thread tied around a trigger finger. It has no dirt, no blood, and no visible knot.

fiber_moss.label: Fiber Moss
fiber_moss.description: Tough ruin moss gathered from inert growths and resin pods.
